---
title: "Examples Dashboard"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
    css: ../dashboard.css
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
        <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
        <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Fraunces:ital,opsz,wght@0,9..144,300;0,9..144,600;1,9..144,300&family=DM+Mono:wght@400;500&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---
Need Instructions? [Here you go!](https://shannonrankin.github.io/open-science-dashboard/content/instructions.html)
```{r}
#| label: load-data

library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(yaml)
library(jsonlite)

# ── PATH CONFIGURATION ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Update these if you ever reorganise the repository structure.
#
#   path_data    — location of examples.yaml, resolved from project root by here()
#   img_folder   — image src prefix as seen by the BROWSER once the site is rendered.
#                  dashboard.qmd lives in content/, and card-images/ is a sibling
#                  folder at content/card-images/. Quarto copies both to the same
#                  output directory, so the browser resolves "card-images/foo.png"
#                  relative to the HTML file — correct for content/card-images/.
#                  If you move dashboard.qmd out of content/, adjust this prefix.
#   img_default  — fallback image used when no image field is set in examples.yaml
#   submit_url   — GitHub new-issue URL (replace YOUR-ORG/YOUR-REPO before deploying)
#
path_data   <- here("_code", "examples.yaml")
img_folder  <- "card-images"
img_default <- paste0(img_folder, "/placeholder.svg")
submit_url  <- paste0(
  "https://github.com/shannonrankin/open-science-dashboard",
  "/issues/new?template=example-submission.yml"
)

# ── Load examples from YAML ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
raw      <- read_yaml(path_data)
examples <- raw$examples

# ── Normalise: ensure list fields are always character vectors ────────────────
`%||%` <- function(x, y) if (is.null(x)) y else x

examples <- map(examples, function(ex) {
  ex$tools    <- as.character(ex$tools    %||% character(0))
  ex$keywords <- as.character(ex$keywords %||% character(0))

  # ── Image path ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  # examples.yaml accepts either:
  #   - A bare filename:  "my-project.png"
  #     -> prefixed with img_folder -> "card-images/my-project.png"
  #     -> file must exist in content/card-images/
  #   - A full external URL: "https://example.com/screenshot.png"
  #     -> used as-is, no local file needed
  #   - Blank / missing -> falls back to img_default (placeholder)
  img_val <- trimws(ex$image %||% "")
  ex$image <- if (img_val == "") {
    img_default
  } else if (startsWith(img_val, "http://") || startsWith(img_val, "https://")) {
    img_val
  } else {
    paste0(img_folder, "/", img_val)
  }

  # Pipe-separate multi-value fields for easy OJS splitting
  ex$tools_str    <- paste(ex$tools,    collapse = "|")
  ex$keywords_str <- paste(ex$keywords, collapse = "|")
  ex
})

# ── Derive master lists for dropdown menus (sorted, deduped) ─────────────────
all_tools <- examples |>
  map("tools") |>
  unlist() |>
  discard(~ is.na(.) | . == "") |>
  unique() |>
  sort()

all_keywords <- examples |>
  map("keywords") |>
  unlist() |>
  discard(~ is.na(.) | . == "") |>
  unique() |>
  sort()

# ── Flatten to data frame for JSON serialisation ──────────────────────────────
examples_df <- map_dfr(examples, \(ex) tibble(
  id          = as.integer(ex$id          %||% NA_integer_),
  title       = as.character(ex$title       %||% ""),
  description = as.character(ex$description %||% ""),
  url         = as.character(ex$url         %||% ""),
  tools       = as.character(ex$tools_str),
  keywords    = as.character(ex$keywords_str),
  image       = as.character(ex$image),
  author      = as.character(ex$author      %||% ""),
  date_added  = as.character(ex$date_added  %||% "")
))

# ── Pass everything to OJS ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
ojs_define(
  r_examples     = examples_df,
  r_all_tools    = all_tools,
  r_all_keywords = all_keywords,
  r_submit_url   = submit_url
)
```

```{ojs}
//| label: data

// Receive data injected from R.
// transpose() converts a columnar data-frame object → array of row-objects.
examples  = transpose(r_examples)
allTools  = r_all_tools
allKws    = r_all_keywords
submitUrl = r_submit_url
```

```{ojs}
//| label: header

html`
<div class="dash-header">
  <div class="dash-header-inner">
    <div class="dash-eyebrow">Resource Library</div>
    <h1 class="dash-title">Examples Dashboard</h1>
    <p class="dash-subtitle">
      Discover community-contributed examples across tools and topics.
      Filter below, or
      <a href="${submitUrl}" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="submit-link">
        submit your own ↗
      </a>
    </p>
  </div>
</div>`
```

```{ojs}
//| label: controls

// ── Keyword search ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
viewof rawSearch = Inputs.text({
  placeholder: "Search by title, description, author…",
  label: null,
  submit: false,
  attributes: { "aria-label": "Search examples" }
})

// ── Tools multi-select ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
viewof rawTools = Inputs.select(allTools, {
  label: "Filter by Tool",
  multiple: true,
  size: Math.min(allTools.length, 8),
  attributes: { "aria-label": "Filter by tool type" }
})

// ── Keywords multi-select ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
viewof rawKeywords = Inputs.select(allKws, {
  label: "Filter by Keyword",
  multiple: true,
  size: Math.min(allKws.length, 8),
  attributes: { "aria-label": "Filter by keyword" }
})
```

```{ojs}
//| label: filtering

// Reactive state derived from inputs
selectedTools    = Array.from(rawTools)
selectedKeywords = Array.from(rawKeywords)
searchQuery      = rawSearch.toLowerCase().trim()

// Filter examples — OR logic within tools, OR logic within keywords
filtered = examples.filter(ex => {
  // 1. Text search across title, description, author, tags
  const textMatch =
    !searchQuery ||
    ex.title.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery) ||
    ex.description.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery) ||
    (ex.author || "").toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery) ||
    ex.tools.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery) ||
    ex.keywords.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery)

  // 2. Tools filter: passes if no tools selected, OR example has ≥1 match
  const exTools  = ex.tools ? ex.tools.split("|").map(t => t.trim()) : []
  const toolMatch =
    selectedTools.length === 0 ||
    selectedTools.some(t => exTools.includes(t))

  // 3. Keywords filter: same OR logic
  const exKws   = ex.keywords ? ex.keywords.split("|").map(k => k.trim()) : []
  const kwMatch =
    selectedKeywords.length === 0 ||
    selectedKeywords.some(k => exKws.includes(k))

  return textMatch && toolMatch && kwMatch
})
```

```{ojs}
//| label: clear-helper

// clearInput(viewofNode, value)
// ─────────────────────────────
// In OJS, viewof bindings are constants — you cannot reassign them with =.
// The correct way to reset an input programmatically is to mutate the
// underlying DOM element directly and then dispatch an "input" event so that
// OJS's reactive runtime picks up the new value.
//
// For Inputs.text  → set .value on the <input> child
// For Inputs.select (multiple) → deselect every <option> in the <select> child

function clearText(viewofEl) {
  const input = viewofEl.querySelector("input")
  if (input) { input.value = ""; input.dispatchEvent(new Event("input", { bubbles: true })) }
}

function clearSelect(viewofEl) {
  const select = viewofEl.querySelector("select")
  if (select) {
    Array.from(select.options).forEach(o => { o.selected = false })
    select.dispatchEvent(new Event("input", { bubbles: true }))
  }
}
```

```{ojs}
//| label: results-bar

html`
<div class="results-bar">
  <span class="results-count">
    ${filtered.length === examples.length
      ? `Showing all <strong>${examples.length}</strong> examples`
      : `Showing <strong>${filtered.length}</strong> of ${examples.length} examples`}
  </span>
  ${(selectedTools.length > 0 || selectedKeywords.length > 0 || searchQuery)
    ? html`<button class="clear-btn" onclick=${() => {
        clearText(viewof rawSearch)
        clearSelect(viewof rawTools)
        clearSelect(viewof rawKeywords)
      }}>✕ Clear all filters</button>`
    : ""}
</div>`
```

```{ojs}
//| label: cards

// ── Tag renderer ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function renderTag(label, type) {
  return html`<span class="tag tag-${type}">${label}</span>`
}

// ── Card renderer ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function renderCard(ex) {
  const toolTags = ex.tools
    ? ex.tools.split("|").map(t => renderTag(t.trim(), "tool"))
    : []
  const kwTags = ex.keywords
    ? ex.keywords.split("|").map(k => renderTag(k.trim(), "keyword"))
    : []

  const hasImage = ex.image &&
    !ex.image.endsWith("/") &&
    ex.image !== ""

  return html`
    <article class="ex-card">
      <div class="card-img-wrap ${hasImage ? "" : "card-img-placeholder"}">
        ${hasImage
          ? html`<img
               src="${ex.image}"
               alt="${ex.title}"
               class="card-img"
               loading="lazy"
               onerror="this.parentElement.classList.add('card-img-placeholder'); this.remove()"
             />`
          : html`<span class="placeholder-icon" aria-hidden="true">◈</span>`}
      </div>
      <div class="card-body">
        <h3 class="card-title">
          <a href="${ex.url}" target="_blank" rel="noopener">${ex.title}</a>
        </h3>
        <p class="card-desc">${ex.description}</p>
        ${ex.author
          ? html`<p class="card-author">by ${ex.author}</p>`
          : ""}
        <div class="card-tags">
          ${toolTags}
          ${kwTags}
        </div>
      </div>
    </article>`
}

// ── Render grid or empty state ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
filtered.length === 0
  ? html`
    <div class="empty-state">
      <div class="empty-icon" aria-hidden="true">◈</div>
      <p>No examples match your current filters.</p>
      <p>
        <a href="${submitUrl}" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
          Know one that should be here? Submit it ↗
        </a>
      </p>
    </div>`
  : html`<div class="card-grid">${filtered.map(renderCard)}</div>`
```

```{ojs}
//| label: submit-cta

html`
<div class="submit-cta">
  <div class="submit-cta-inner">
    <div class="submit-icon" aria-hidden="true">✦</div>
    <h2>Know a great example?</h2>
    <p>
      Contributions from the community keep this dashboard growing.
      Submit a resource using our GitHub Issue template — an admin will
      review it and add it to the next site build.
    </p>
    <a href="${submitUrl}" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="submit-btn">
      Submit an Example ↗
    </a>
  </div>
</div>`
```
